title: Exotic Tender Chinese Grass Noodles
description: A delicious and adventurous Chinese dish featuring tender noodles and a savory sauce, made with a variety of ingredients including oil and deglaze-fond, finished with a dash of friendly seasoning.
instructions: Bring a large pot of water to a boil and cook the Chinese grass noodles according to the package instructions.
In a small bowl, whisk together the soy sauce, oyster sauce, and sesame oil.
In a large skillet or wok, heat the vegetable oil over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and ginger to the skillet and stir-fry until fragrant.
Add the cooked noodles to the skillet and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Pour the soy sauce mixture into the skillet and stir-fry for another minute.
Add the scallions, salt, and black pepper to the skillet and stir-fry for 30 seconds.
Use a small amount of the cooking water to deglaze the fond in the skillet.
Serve the noodles hot, garnished with additional scallions if desired.
